basic_details.job_title: CEIL Recruitment 2026 Notification Out - Apply Online for 85 QA/QC Engineer, Officer and More Posts
basic_details.organization_name: Certification Engineers International Limited (CEIL), A Govt. of India Undertaking and wholly owned subsidiary of Engineers India Limited (EIL)
basic_details.post_name: QA/QC Engineer – Mechanical/Production; QA/QC Engineer – Electrical & Instrumentation; QA/QC Engineer – Civil; Safety Officer; Marketing & Business Development Officer; Contract & Purchase Officer; Office Management Officer; HR Associate
basic_details.total_vacancies: 85 (tentative) across Officer Grade-I, II, III, IV and HR Associate Grade-II
basic_details.job_type: Fixed Term Contract – Initial period of 1 year, extendable for up to 36 months subject to satisfactory performance and project requirement
basic_details.short_information: CEIL is recruiting 85 Fixed Term Contract posts across QA/QC Engineering, Safety, Marketing, SCM, Office Management, and HR functions, last date 15 June 2026.

important_dates.interview_date: To be intimated via email to shortlisted candidates; Interviews at CEIL office, Navi Mumbai

application_fee.details: The notification does not mention any application fee. Applications are to be submitted online free of charge through CEIL's official recruitment portal at https://www6.eil.co.in/ceilrecruitment/.

age_limit.details: Age is calculated as on 30.04.2026. Upper age limits are as per designation and discipline, detailed in the vacancy table above. Relaxations are applicable as per Government of India guidelines.

qualification.details: Only Indian Nationals are eligible to apply. Candidates must meet the educational qualification and post-qualification experience requirements as on the cut-off date 30.04.2026. Prescribed educational qualifications and experience are the minimum qualifying criteria - mere possession does not entitle candidates for interview.

vacancy_details.Positions: QA/QC Engineer – Mechanical/Production, QA/QC Engineer – E&I, QA/QC Engineer – Civil

QA/QC Engineer – Mechanical/Production, Officer Grade-II [Mech – Offshore(Deep Sea)], QA/QC Engineer – E&I, Officer Grade-II [E&I – Offshore(Deep Sea)], QA/QC Engineer – Civil, Marketing & Business Development, Contract & Purchase, Office Management, HR Associate
QA/QC Engineer – Mechanical/Production, QA/QC Engineer – E&I, QA/QC Engineer – Civil, Safety Officer
QA/QC Engineer – Mechanical/Production, QA/QC Engineer – E&I

salary_details.details: Section 1: QA/QC Engineers (Third Party Inspection / Certification Engineers) | Section 2: Marketing & Business Development, Contract & Purchase, Office Management, HR Associate | Other benefits include: annual increment @ 3% on consolidated salary (for extensions beyond 1 year, applicable for up to next 2 years); Medical Insurance of minimum ₹2,00,000/- for self - premium reimbursed by CEIL; Medical Fitness Certificate expense reimbursable at time of joining. No TA/DA for attending interviews. No other perks or allowances beyond consolidated salary. Company's PF contribution is part of the consolidated salary. HRA component in salary may vary based on city of posting classification (calculated considering 'X' class city HRA).

selection_process: Applications received will be put up to a Committee for shortlisting. Screening and selection will be based on the details provided in the application form - only accurate
full and correct information should be furnished. Furnishing of wrong/false information will result in disqualification.
how_to_apply: Candidates shall apply online only through CEIL's official recruitment portal. Applications received through any other mode shall not be entertained. Candidates are advised to apply well before the closing date. Applications found incomplete or received after the due date are liable to be rejected.
Documents Required at the time of Interview:
Educational and Professional Qualifications (all marksheets & certificates)
important_instructions: This is a Fixed Term Contract engagement - purely on a temporary basis. It does not carry any liability on CEIL for regular appointment at any stage. Total contract period will not exceed 36 months under any circumstances. Initial appointment is for one year, extendable (if required) for another 36 months or till completion of the project, whichever is earlier, subject to satisfactory performance. Selected candidates will initially be posted at CEIL Head Office, Navi Mumbai but may be posted at any CEIL office or project site anywhere in India at management's discretion. Only candidates willing to serve anywhere in India need apply. No perks or allowances other than the consolidated salary are payable. In case of extension beyond one year, increment @ 3% per year will be considered for the next 2 years. Fixed Term Personnel must take Medical Insurance of minimum ₹2,00,000/- for self; the premium will be reimbursed by CEIL. CGPA/OGPA/CPI or letter grade in Degree must be converted to equivalent percentage as per university/institute norms and documentary proof will be required at interview. No TA/DA will be given for attending interviews. Candidates must be of sound health; Medical Fitness Certificate from Government Hospital / Company Nominated Hospital is required at the time of joining (expense reimbursable on original receipt). Contractual engagement may be terminated by CEIL at any time at its sole discretion without assigning any reason if performance/conduct is found unsatisfactory. For termination during currency of contract, one month's written notice or one month's consolidated pay in lieu thereof shall be given by either party. Reservation and relaxation for PwDs shall be as per GOI guidelines. Persons with 40% or more disabilities are eligible. Experience prescribed is relaxable at the discretion of CEIL for SC/ST candidates. Canvassing in any form will result in disqualification. Number of vacancies indicated are only tentative; CEIL reserves the right to cancel/restrict/modify/alter selection/recruitment process at any stage without notice. CEIL also reserves the right to reject any candidature without assigning any reason whatsoever. Any dispute arising from this recruitment will be under the jurisdiction of Mumbai court only.
